Description:
Quick walkthrough of Entra Backup and Restore and how it complements soft delete and protected actions.

▬▬▬▬▬▬ C H A P T E R S ⏰ ▬▬▬▬▬▬ 00:00 - Introduction 00:17 - Entra daily snapshot 01:45 - Restoring state 02:50 - Difference report 04:34 - Recovering 05:13 - Soft delete 07:08 - Protected actions 09:36 - Complete solution 10:10 - Close
